# rhcs_gcp_machine_pool (Resource)

Additional worker machine pool for an OSD cluster on GCP. Uses a distinct
TypeName from [rhcs_machine_pool](machine_pool.md) (ROSA Classic) and
[rhcs_hcp_machine_pool](hcp_machine_pool.md) (ROSA HCP) because each variant
takes cloud-specific options.

The name `worker` and any `workers-*` name are reserved for the cluster's
default worker pool, which is managed inline on the cluster resource and is
not yet manageable as a separate machine pool.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "rhcs_gcp_machine_pool" "large" {
  cluster_id    = rhcs_cluster_osd_gcp.osd.id
  name          = "large"
  instance_type = "n2-standard-8"
  replicas      = 2

  labels = {
    "node-role.kubernetes.io/large" = "true"
  }

  gcp = {
    secure_boot = true
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) Identifier of the cluster.
- `instance_type` (String) GCP machine type (e.g., custom-4-16384).
- `name` (String) Name of the machine pool. Cannot be 'worker' or 'workers-*' (reserved for the default worker pool, which is not yet manageable as a machine pool resource).

### Optional

- `autoscaling` (Attributes) Autoscaling configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--autoscaling))
- `availability_zones` (List of String) GCP availability zones. When not specified, OCM assigns a default zone; this value is populated from the API after create.
- `gcp` (Attributes) GCP-specific machine pool options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--gcp))
- `labels` (Map of String) Kubernetes labels.
- `replicas` (Number) Number of replicas (when not using autoscaling).
- `root_volume_size` (Number) Root volume size in GiB.
- `taints` (Attributes List) Taints for the machine pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--taints))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the machine pool.

<a id="nestedatt--autoscaling"></a>
### Nested Schema for `autoscaling`

Required:

- `max_replicas` (Number)
- `min_replicas` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--gcp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `gcp`

Optional:

- `secure_boot` (Boolean) Enable Shielded VM Secure Boot.


<a id="nestedatt--taints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `taints`

Required:

- `effect` (String)
- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)
